zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen於大約1125年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧時，他的父親Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen32歲，母親Hildegard von Henneberg24歲。他於1159年與Adelheid von Lauffen在德國爾特波格可萊斯 貝希海姆勞費 阿姆 內卡勞費結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年享年55歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊其高。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen于大约1125年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧时，他的父亲Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen32岁，母亲Hildegard von Henneberg24岁。他于1159年与Adelheid von Lauffen在德国爾特波格可萊斯 貝希海姆勞費 阿姆 內卡勞費结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年享年55岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊其高。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen was born about 1125, in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, his father, Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen, was 32 and his mother, Hildegard von Henneberg, was 24. He married Adelheid von Lauffen in 1159, in Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Besigheim, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1179, at the age of 55, and was buried in Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen est né environ 1125, à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hildegard von Henneberg, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Lauffen en 1159, à Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1179, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.Lauffen,Neckarkreis,Wuerttemberg: Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen um 1125 in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen 32 und seine Mutter Hildegard von Henneberg 24. Er hat 1159 in Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Deutschland Adelheid von Lauffen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1179 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen è nato il circa 1125 nel Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Hildegard von Henneberg, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Lauffen nel 1159, nel Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1179, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogenが約1125年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウで生まれた時，父Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogenは32歳，母Hildegard von Hennebergは24歳であった。1159年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ベシグヘイムラウフン アム ネッカーラウフンでAdelheid von Lauffenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年に55歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイチガウにて埋葬された。

ko.Lauffen,Neckarkreis,Wuerttemberg: 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 베시게이임 로펜 아 니c카르 로펜
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen(이)가 대략 1125년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegard von Henneberg(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1159년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 베시게이임 로펜 아 니c카르 로펜에서 Adelheid von Lauffen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이ch가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hildegard von Henneberg, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Lauffen em 1159, em Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1179, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Lauffen,Neckarkreis,Wuerttemberg: лауффен, лауффен ам неккар, крис бесаиим, вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen родился около 1125 г. в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hildegard von Henneberg, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Lauffen в 1159 г. в местности лауффен, лауффен ам неккар, крис бесаиим, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1179 г. в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности креичгау, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich III von Katzenelnbogen nació aproximadamente 1125, en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich ll von Katzenelenbogen, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Hildegard von Henneberg, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Lauffen en 1159, en Lauffen, Lauffen am Neckar, Kreis Besigheim, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1179, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Kraichgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
